rulings.Case Title: ROBERT ROSS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Second Amended Notice Of Motion In Support Of Defendant Turner Construction Company S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One, Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, And For An Order Striking Improper Objections; Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, August 25, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Turner Construction Company¿s motion to compel further discovery responses and for sanctions is continued to August 31, 2010 to enable the parties to engage in further meet and confer efforts regarding the adequacy of the discovery responses served by plaintiff after the motion was filed. If all issues raised by the motion have not been resolved before then, the parties are required to send an email by 4pm on August 30 to constestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, the remaining disputes and then appear at the hearing at 9:00 a.m. on August 31, 2010. = (220/HEK)
